info.title: Alga PSA API
info.description: OpenAPI specification generated from registered route metadata.

BoardCreateRequest.description: Payload for creating a new board.

BoardUpdateRequest.description: Payload for updating a board. All fields are optional.

StatusCreateRequest.description: Payload for creating a new status. For ticket statuses, board_id is required.

StatusUpdateRequest.description: Payload for updating a status. All fields are optional.

ServiceCategoryCreateRequest.description: Payload for creating a service category.

ServiceCategoryListQuery.description: Query parameters for listing service categories.

ProjectTaskUpdateRequest.description: Payload for updating a project task. To change task status, send project_status_mapping_id as a UUID. This endpoint does not accept project_id, phase_id, or human-readable status names.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of ticket boards for the current tenant. Use this to discover valid board_id values before creating tickets or statuses.

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission.

post.description: Creates a new ticket board. After creating a board, create at least one status for it via POST /api/v1/statuses so tickets can be assigned to the board.

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns a single board by its UUID.

put.description: Updates an existing board. All fields are optional — only send the fields you want to change.

delete.description: Deletes a board by its UUID. This will fail if the board has associated tickets.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of statuses. For ticket statuses, filter by type=ticket and board_id to get statuses that belong to a specific board. The status_id must belong to the same board_id when creating tickets.

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission.

post.description: Creates a new status. For ticket statuses, board_id is required. The status_type must be one of: ticket, project, project_task, interaction.

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns a single status by its UUID.

put.description: Updates an existing status. All fields are optional — only send the fields you want to change.

delete.description: Deletes a status by its UUID. Cannot delete the last default status for a board.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of service categories within the current tenant.

200.description: A paginated list of service categories.

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission.

post.description: Creates a new service category for the tenant. Requires the billing settings create permission.

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns the task status mappings configured for the specified project. Use this endpoint to translate a human-readable status label such as "In Progress" into a project_status_mapping_id UUID before updating a task.

200.description: Project task status mappings returned successfully.

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns all tasks for the specified project UUID. Use this endpoint to identify a task by task_name before fetching or updating it.

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns all tasks for the specified project phase. Both id and phaseId must be UUID path parameters.

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission.

get.description: Returns a single project task by its task UUID.

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission.

put.description: Updates a project task by task UUID. Use project_status_mapping_id when changing task status, and only send fields defined in the request schema.

403.description: Authenticated user lacks the required permission.
